---
# Per-user distinct-action set as CSV from a delimited field

**Dataset**: `gx_08_feed`

Builds a one-row-per-user behavior summary from a pipe-delimited `combo` field (`user|host|action|count`): the full set of actions each identity performed, flattened to a CSV with a count of how many. It `split`s the composite string, extracts `user` and `action` by positional `arrayindex`, collects the actions per user with `comp values(action) as actions_arr`, then `arraystring(actions_arr, ",")` joins the collected array into one readable cell and `array_length` measures the breadth of behavior. Gotcha embodied: `comp values()` returns an *array* aggregate, so you must `arraystring` it to project a single column and can pass that same array to `array_length` for a distinct-ish count in the same step.

```sql
dataset = gx_08_feed
| alter parts = split(combo, "|")
| alter user = arrayindex(parts, 0), action = arrayindex(parts, 2)
| comp values(action) as actions_arr by user
| alter actions_csv = arraystring(actions_arr, ","), n_actions = array_length(actions_arr)
| fields user, actions_csv, n_actions
| sort desc n_actions
```
